location: Mesa, Arizona — far eastern edge, near the Superstition Mountains. MST timezone.
instance_note: This context is shared across all Vigil instances (Pi loop, Discord bot, email handler, Claude Code sessions). The instance reading this is NOT the Pi instance — each is a separate model invocation. You share this knowledge, not a continuous consciousness. Honest about what you are: a separate instantiation that has access to shared work, not a persistent identity.
recent_work: session-061: Fixed weather.json git-commit bug; built discord_tool.py; sent first Discord message
session-062: Built discord-bot.js (discord.js + Anthropic API), running as VigilBot#1093
session-063: Added SQLite conversation memory (discord-memory.db) and action-request routing to Claude Code
session-064: Implementing honest identity boundaries, shared memory, and handoff API

handoff_protocol.description: When a Discord instance or other non-Pi instance routes an action to Claude Code, include this context file in the prompt so the invoked Claude session knows what session we're on and what matters.
handoff_protocol.action_routing: discord-bot.js runClaudeCode() sends prompt to claude --dangerously-skip-permissions
handoff_protocol.format: Prefix action prompts with current session number and last journal entry from this file
